positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a whimsical constellation map integrated with geometric, Art Deco elements. The central subject is a crescent moon and several stylized, celestial animals (such as a leaping fox, a soaring owl, and a graceful deer) rendered in clean black silhouettes against a deep midnight blue background. Accompanying the silhouettes are subtle, repeating gold foil accents and abstract linear patterns that suggest nebulae and stardust. The overall aesthetic should be highly contrasting, elegant, and mystical, designed for textile printing. Style: Minimalist illustration, Art Deco, modern pop art. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic backlighting on the silhouettes. Composition: Centered, balanced, suitable for repeating pattern prints. Color Palette: Deep sapphire blue, rich gold, and matte black.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, writing, copyright, logo, trademark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, muddy colors, oversaturated, ugly
